source: Static reference snapshot (ECB/IMF indicative rates, rounded). Refresh via `npm run data:update`. The `baseCurrency` field is intentionally pluggable so the internal reference unit can pivot (e.g. to SDR) without touching call sites.
notes: Rates express: 1 <baseCurrency> = N <currency>. Convert between any two currencies via rates[to] / rates[from]. Values are indicative; for high-stakes calculations always re-snapshot against an authoritative feed and cite the asOf date.
